_comment: Species: Spirit Wolf Pack Leader (灵狼首领) from Renegade Immortal. Per user directive: every miscellaneous beast from RI must be accounted for and part of the ecosystem. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every being described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Spirit Wolf Pack Leader

canonical.appearance: Larger wind wolf 3 m, fur silver-alpha, eyes command the pack
canonical.size: 3 m adult, 400 jin; ancient 5 m, 3000 jin
canonical.behavior: Alpha of wind wolf packs; commands pack tactics; cultivates by leading hunts
canonical.habitat: Plains, wind-aspected spirit veins, mountain foothills
canonical.diet: spirit deer, spirit rabbits, lost travelers
canonical.relationships: Alpha of wind wolf packs; rival of mountain lions
canonical.ecology: Integrated into RI ecosystem definitions; see ecosystem_integration.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: spirit_wolf_pack_leader — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
